## Summary

Describe the change and the overall motivation. Link to GitHub issue(s) where applicable.

## Changes
- What changed
- Why it is needed

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch: `feature/<short>-<ticket>`
- [ ] Tests added / updated
- [ ] CI passes (see .github/workflows/p2-ci.yml)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Issue linked and assignees added

## Deployment Notes
- Any migration or rollout steps
